2606.15412.title: Few-Shot Biomedical Relation Extraction with Large Language Models: A Viable Alternative to Supervised Learning?
2606.15412.paper_summary: Biomedical relation extraction (BioRE) is a key step in transforming biomedical literature into structured knowledge. However, most existing approaches rely on supervised models trained on costly annotated datasets, limiting their scalability and adaptability across relation types and domains. We investigate few-shot BioRE using prompt-based learning with large language models (LLMs) and compare two task formulations: pairwise classification, which predicts relations for individual entity pairs, and joint generation, which extracts multiple relations in a single model call. Experiments on the BioREDirect dataset reveal a clear precision-recall trade-off. Pairwise classification achieves higher recall, whereas joint generation is more precise and computationally efficient. The best-performing model achieves a micro-F1 score of 0.44, substantially outperforming previous few-shot results (0.34) while remaining below the supervised baseline (0.56). Much of this gap is attributable to a single ambiguously defined relation type. When evaluated using macro-F1, which better captures performance across relation types in an imbalanced setting, prompt-based approaches outperform the supervised baseline (0.45 vs. 0.38), particularly on rare relation types. These findings highlight the potential of LLMs for BioRE in low-resource settings and underscore the importance of well-defined relation schemas.
2606.15412.paper_summary_zh: 生物醫學關係提取（BioRE）是將生物醫學文獻轉化為結構化知識的關鍵步驟。<lb/>然而，大多數現有方法依賴於在成本高昂的標註數據集上訓練的監督模型，限制了它們在關係類型和領域之間的可擴展性和適應性。<lb/>我們研究了使用基於提示的學習和大型語言模型（LLMs）的少樣本BioRE，並比較了兩種任務表述：成對分類，預測個別實體對之間的關係，以及聯合生成，在單次模型調用中提取多個關係。<lb/>在BioREDirect數據集上的實驗顯示出明顯的精確率-召回率權衡。<lb/>成對分類實現了更高的召回率，而聯合生成則更精確且計算效率更高。<lb/>表現最佳的模型達到了0.44的微F1分數，顯著超過了之前的少樣本結果（0.34），但仍低於監督基線（0.56）。<lb/>這一差距在很大程度上可歸因於一個定義模糊的關係類型。<lb/>當使用宏F1進行評估時，這更好地捕捉了不平衡設置中各關係類型的表現，基於提示的方法超過了監督基線（0.45對0.38），特別是在稀有關係類型上。<lb/>這些發現突顯了LLMs在低資源環境中對BioRE的潛力，並強調了明確定義的關係架構的重要性。
2606.15412.author: Jakob Mraz et.al.
2606.15412.authors: Jakob Mraz, Tomaž Curk, Blaž Zupan
